titles.title: Lord I Want to Be a Christian

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord I want to be a Christian in my heart, in my heart, Lord I want to be a Christian in my heart, in my heart, In my heart Lord I want to be a Christian in my heart.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord I want to be more holy in my life Lord I want to be more holy in my life In my life Lord I want to be more holy in my life

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I want to be more loving in my heart In my heart, In my heart Lord I want to be more loving in my heart, in my heart, In my heart Lord I want to be more loving in my heart.
